title: ast.parse_file request
description: Parse a single source file into a tree-sitter AST. The grammar is selected from the file extension unless `language` is supplied explicitly.

path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the source file.

language.description: Optional override for the tree-sitter grammar (e.g. "rust", "swift", "typescript").

max_bytes.description: Optional cap on the number of bytes parsed; 0 means unlimited.
